issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 12 dmg (52% of 23 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: At turn seq 194 (floor 3, encounter 2, turn 10), the enemy dealt 12 damage when the player had 23 HP. This is 52% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 12 damage (52% of player's 23 HP)

issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 38 dmg (173% of 22 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: At turn seq 214 (floor 3, encounter 2, turn 15), the enemy dealt 38 damage when the player had 22 HP. This is 173% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 38 damage (173% of player's 22 HP)

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 (the_curator) — expert profile
issues.description: The expert player was defeated by the_curator (boss) on floor 3, encounter 2 after 15 turns. They dealt 147 damage but took 130. Accuracy was 84.4%.

evidence.metric: Defeated on floor 3 by the_curator (130 damage taken)

issues.suggestedFix: Scale early floor difficulty more gradually

issues.title: Systemic combo cap bug: maxCombo=3 despite 89.4% accuracy (expert)
issues.description: The expert player achieved 89.4% overall accuracy across 9 encounters, yet maxCombo never exceeded 3. Every single run across ALL profiles shows maxCombo capped at exactly 3, indicating a hard cap bug in the combo system. The combo multiplier progression (1.0x->1.15x->1.3x->1.5x->2.0x) is unreachable beyond combo 3, removing a core damage scaling mechanic.
reproductionSteps: Answer 4+ questions correctly in a single turn
issues.suggestedFix: Investigate combo counter reset logic — likely resets at end of each turn or encounter instead of persisting across consecutive correct answers within a turn. Check if hand size (typically 3-5 cards) is capping combos.

issues.title: Difficulty spike: stone_sentinel on floor 2 took 10 turns (prev floor avg: 4.0)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 2 against stone_sentinel (mini_boss) required 10 turns to resolve, which is 2.5x the previous floor's average of 4.0 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold for difficulty spikes. The player dealt 121 damage and took 11.
issues.suggestedFix: Review stone_sentinel HP/damage scaling for floor 2; consider smoother difficulty curve for mini_boss enemies

issues.title: Difficulty spike: the_curator on floor 3 took 15 turns (prev floor avg: 5.3)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 3 against the_curator (boss) required 15 turns to resolve, which is 2.8x the previous floor's average of 5.3 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold for difficulty spikes. The player dealt 147 damage and took 130.
issues.suggestedFix: Review the_curator HP/damage scaling for floor 3; consider smoother difficulty curve for boss enemies

issues.title: Expert player defeated on floor 3 with 89.4% accuracy — something is very wrong
issues.description: An expert player with 89.4% accuracy dying on floor 3 is a critical balance failure. 9 encounters, 151 cards played. The combo cap bug (maxCombo=3) limits damage multipliers, but even without combos, 89% accuracy should survive the first 3 floors comfortably.

evidence.metric: Expert defeat on floor 3 at 89.4% accuracy

issues.suggestedFix: Investigate floor 3 boss scaling; fix combo cap; possibly reduce early boss HP by 20-30%
